final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 3x3 character expression grid for Zhao Ling'er (赵灵儿) from the Legend of Sword and Fairy (仙剑奇侠传) IP.

Style/medium: 3D animation, Pixar-style character rendering, soft subsurface scattering on skin, expressive stylized proportions
Composition: 3x3 grid layout with 9 equal panels, each showing character peeking through a torn circular hole in white paper, consistent framing across all panels
Subject: young woman with voluminous dark wavy hair and round wire-rimmed glasses, Zhao Ling'er-inspired facial features and gentle demeanor
Scene/backdrop: plain white paper texture with torn hole edges, minimal background to keep focus on expressions
Lighting/mood: soft diffused studio lighting, warm and friendly atmosphere, consistent illumination across all 9 panels
Color palette: varied outfit colors per panel (green, red, yellow, black/white, orange, blue, purple, pink, teal) against neutral white paper backdrop
Materials/textures: smooth Pixar-style skin, fabric clothing textures, paper fiber detail on torn edges
Text (verbatim): "赵灵儿"
Constraints: maintain character consistency across all 9 panels; same face structure, hair style, and glasses in every panel; only expression and outfit change
Avoid: photorealistic rendering, anime style, 2D flat illustration, inconsistent character proportions between panels, deformed hands, asymmetrical glasses
